staging.placement_rm_monthly.grain: One row per placement per relationship manager per month

staging.placement_rm_monthly_manual.purpose: Manually maintained monthly snapshots of placement and relationship manager assignments without ETL metadata.
staging.placement_rm_monthly_manual.grain: One row per placement per relationship manager per month

target.placement_rm_history.purpose: Tracks historical relationship manager assignment changes for placements (currently empty structure).
target.placement_rm_history.grain: One row per relationship manager change per placement

target.placement_rm_history_temporary_ta.purpose: Temporary staging table for placement relationship manager history data during ETL processing.
target.placement_rm_history_temporary_ta.grain: One row per relationship manager change per placement

quickbooks.qb_income_fact_consolidated.purpose: Stores consolidated QuickBooks income and revenue data aggregated across divisions and account categories.
quickbooks.qb_income_fact_consolidated.grain: One row per account per division per amount type per category hierarchy per report date

quickbooks.qb_income_fact_consolidated_t.purpose: Test version of consolidated QuickBooks income statement fact table for multi-dimensional financial analysis.
quickbooks.qb_income_fact_consolidated_t.grain: One row per account per division per amount type per category hierarchy per report date

staging.bqp_employees.purpose: Stores employee records for internal staff members including account associations and employment lifecycle tracking.

staging.resume_scoring_item_bkp.purpose: Backup copy of detailed item-level resume scoring data evaluating candidate qualifications against job requirements.
staging.resume_scoring_item_bkp.grain: One row per scored item per category per application

staging.bqp_company.purpose: Master company directory storing organizational profiles, hierarchies, and company attributes.

staging.classic_industry_types.purpose: Stores mid-level industry classification types within broader categories supporting hierarchical industry taxonomy.

staging.resume_scoring_item.purpose: Stores detailed item-level scoring of specific resume qualifications against job requirements including skill and experience matches.
staging.resume_scoring_item.grain: One row per scored item per category per application

staging.resume_scoring_result.purpose: Stores final aggregated results of resume scoring evaluations including overall scores, recommendations, and minimum requirement assessments for job applications.
staging.resume_scoring_result.grain: One resume scoring result per application

staging.resume_scoring_result_bkp.purpose: Backup copy of final resume scoring results serving as a historical snapshot of evaluation outcomes and recommendations.
staging.resume_scoring_result_bkp.grain: One resume scoring result per application (backup)

staging.bullhorn_eligibility.purpose: Tracks candidate eligibility status, contact information, and compliance requirements including work hour thresholds and eligibility milestones.

staging.bqp_applications.purpose: Stores core job application records with applicant details including contact information and company context.

staging.bqp_candidate_near_miss_report.purpose: Analytical report identifying candidates who nearly qualified but didn't advance, providing insights for reconsideration or process improvement.
staging.bqp_candidate_near_miss_report.grain: One record per near-miss candidate application

staging.new_sheet.purpose: Reference data table containing standardized taxonomy and classification values for job-related attributes, candidate qualifications, and machine learning predictions.
staging.new_sheet.grain: One record per taxonomy or classification entry

staging.classic_computer_operating_syste.purpose: Reference table containing available computer operating system options used for tracking candidate and employee technology specifications.

staging.rbac_validation_test.purpose: Test records for validating role-based access control functionality and security testing.
staging.rbac_validation_test.grain: One record per RBAC test execution

target.relationship_manager_placement_co.purpose: View tracking placements managed by relationship managers over time with temporal span tracking.
target.relationship_manager_placement_co.grain: One record per placement per relationship manager assignment period
